title: MTT assay
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"93s5d","text":"Protocol for MTT cytotoxicity assay on SH-SY5Y cells.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"6up71","text":"Medium: DMEM/F-12, GlutaMAXTM (ThermoFisher Scientific) + 10% Fetal Bovine Serum (GibcoTM)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"sup","offset":27,"length":2},{"style":"sup","offset":87,"length":2}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"6m3qp","text":"Trypsin-EDTA (0.25%)  (ThermoFisher Scientific)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9h5uj","text":"PBS, pH 7.4 (ThermoFisher Scientific)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"mt41","text":"RPMI medium (ThermoFisher Scientific)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"8fauh","text":"MTT kit (Abcam)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"blm6s","text":"96-well plates, PS, F-bottom (Greiner Bio-One)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"2fu7k","text":"Plate shaker","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"c2m3b","text":"Plate reader for absorbance measurement","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Culture human SH-SY5Y cells at 37 °C and 5% CO 2
Incubate at 37 °C and 5% CO 2 for 24 h
Place back at 37 °C and 5% CO 2 for 24 h
Add 100 µL MTT/RPMI solution per well
Place back at 37 °C and 5% CO 2 for 4 h
Add 100 µL stop solution per well
Incubate at 37 °C, 500 rpm on plate shaker
Read out absorbance at 570 nm on plate reader
creator: Alexander Röntgen
